data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aims to validate the requirement of having different hours per location, but there is no evidence provided that explicitly confirms this requirement is satisfied. The linked use case mentions the need for different hours per location, but the evidence does not include any checks or validations regarding the actual hours for each location. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence needed to confirm this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of different operating hours for each location.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
